data.body: Remediated + committed as 15e585ae5. Fix: has_llm_steps._scan now recurses into v3 bare-array branch/loop/map arms. Regression test asserts True for a synthetic v3 branch/loop AND both shipped gates via _gate_doc. Verified empirically (all 3 gates True, det-only False); workflow+lifecycle suites (493 tests) green. Awaiting Gerrit landing.
